query: SELECT ct.id, ct.codigo, ct.fila, ct.titulo, ct.status, ct.slaHoras, ct.slaStatus, ct.dataVencimento, ct.createdAt, ct.clienteId, ct.caseId FROM credit_tasks ct WHERE ct.fila = 'apuracao' ORDER BY ct.id DESC LIMIT 5;
